title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that language choice significantly impacts AI development workflows and team productivity. The video recommends TypeScript over Python for AI coding due to benefits of type checking, LSPs, and early error detection, while acknowledging that Python adds friction through runtime mistakes when scaled with AI tools.
